## Summary

Describe the skill behavior or repository change.

## Verification

- [ ] Skill triggers and behavior are specific and testable.
- [ ] No secrets, customer data, or unsafe live-test defaults are included.
- [ ] Manifests and discovery metadata are aligned.
- [ ] Documentation links and examples were checked.
- [ ] `scripts/validate-skill.sh` passes.
- [ ] Marketplace synchronization was considered.
